flagged.detail: The front carries a trailing 'example?' sub-prompt that the cloze blank ('behavioral/conscious') does not answer; the example is only supplied in the Extra field, so the blank-to-question correspondence reads incompletely.
flagged.evidence:
Q: 'Unlike proprioception, kinaesthesia is [...] example?' / Text: '...is {{c1::behavioral/conscious}}
example?
'

notes: Batch 15 is drawn entirely from the MrPankow 6A/6B P/S cloze deck (all AACloze notes) and is in excellent structural shape: cloze {{cN::...}} markup, embedded <font>/<b>/<u>/<i> HTML, and HTML entities ( , >) are balanced and well-formed across all 257 cards, with correct Q/A correspondence and no unrendered template artifacts ('{{', 'FrontSide', etc.). No LaTeX/MathJax is present in this batch, so delimiter checks are not applicable. The only flagged item is one card whose front includes a stray 'example?' prompt answered only via the Extra field; numerous content-level spelling typos exist throughout (e.g., 'seperating', 'recieves', 'percieve', 'declerative', 'Repalse', 'oribofrontal') but they leave the text readable/studyable and are out of scope for these structural checks.
